VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited — published at NeurIPS 2019 with authors Yaqi Duan, Tracy Ke (full name: Zheng Tracy Ke), and Mengdi Wang. The automated checker's "mismatch" of "Tracy Ke" vs. "Z. Ke" is merely a name formatting difference (full first name vs. initial), not a substantive discrepancy.
LINK: https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper/2019/hash/070dbb6024b5ef93784428afc71f2146-Abstract.html
